title: prunus domestica subsp. cerasifera
intro: Prunus domestica subsp. cerasifera, also known as the cherry plum or myrobalan plum, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Prunus genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of P. domestica subsp. cerasifera include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, have been used to treat various conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
